ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the species is typically found */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., Endangered, Vulnerable) */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Biological kingdom to which the species belongs */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Biological phylum to which the species belongs */,
  "class" TEXT /* Biological class to which the species belongs */,
  "order" TEXT /* Biological order to which the species belongs */,
  "family" TEXT /* Biological family to which the species belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Biological genus to which the species belongs */,
  "average_lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "reproduction" TEXT /* Reproductive habits of the species */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Major threats to the species */,
  "conservation_actions" TEXT /* Actions taken for the conservation of the species */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the species information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sighting event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being observed */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the sighting occurred (e.g., Winter, Spring) */,
  "sighting_status" TEXT /* Status of the sighting (e.g., Vagrant, Rare, Uncommon) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sighting occurred */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the sighting */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the sighting */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who made the sighting */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the sighting */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the sighting information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasonal_sightings_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasonal_sightings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., forest, desert, wetland) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the location information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, field worker, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species being accessed */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES seasonal_sightings ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting the report is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_reports_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES seasonal_sightings ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the image belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "photographer_name" TEXT /* Name of the photographer */,
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photographer */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., close-up, landscape) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the image information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_images_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting the image belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "photographer_name" TEXT /* Name of the photographer */,
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photographer */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., close-up, landscape) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the image information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_images_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES seasonal_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting the comment is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., general, scientific) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_comments_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES seasonal_sightings ("sighting_id")
)
